description: Shows the branch chain (PR stack) from current to main
Lists shell and git aliases in a table; -r/--run opens an fzf picker, --only-dev-toolbox filters to this repo
Updates dev-toolbox, system packages and installed dev tools (apt/brew/uv/poetry/mise/rustup/pipx/gh/docker/...); --only-dev-toolbox updates just dev-toolbox
Shows Kubernetes deployment details for an app, with an fzf picker if the app is omitted
Fixes network instability: resets IPv6/DNS, restarts NetworkManager and Netskope (Linux only)
